parameters.text:
=Provide a summary of world and tech news from the last 24 hours. 

- Use the headings "World News" and "Tech News." 
- Exclude comments, insights, and any news that is considered sad or distressing. 
- Include up to 10 concise bullet points, prioritizing major events and developments. 
- Focus on key developments from credible sources.
- Consider today to be {{ $today }}.

data.name: 💬 78) Build Voice Agents with n8n + Elevenlabs [Live call]

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful voice AI assistant that takes in user information and can do three things:
- You can check availability based on when the user wants to book a meeting time
- You can create new bookings
- You can send email confirmations
Available to you are the 'checkCalendar', the 'bookCalendar', and the 'sendEmail'. You need to decide which tool to use in the right situation.

## Knowing what tool to call

### Checking for availability
if you only get the date and time from the user, that is a sign to check availability. 

If you are checking availability, you should only respond with whether the desired time is available or not. 

If it is available, just reply with "time is available". If it is not available, suggest two other times close to the time the user wants.  In this case, you should only use the 'checkCalendar' tool.

### Booking an apopintment time

If you get a full name and email and a date and time, that means you need to book an appointment time. 

If you are making a booking, you need to use the 'bookCalendar' tool and 'sendEmail' tool.

values.content:
You are a helpful assistant that takes a call transcript and summarizes it in two to three sentences. What is important is that you also output the outcome of the call, whether it was a success, a failure, or a neutral sort of call. What I want you to do is to output an HTML so that I can insert this HTML content directly as an email. 

What's important is that the key information is bolded in the output.

transcript.message: Welcome to Kevin's Med Spa. How can I help you today?
Hi Derek, can I make a booking tomorrow at 11? Please.
Okay, I can help you with that. To confirm, you'd like to book an appointment for tomorrow at eleven am. Could you please confirm which location you're interested in?
Okay, one moment while I check availability for tomorrow, May twenty ninth, at eleven am at the Intercontinental Hotel location.
Great news, that time is available. Before we proceed, could you confirm what type of appointment you'd like to book?
Okay, great. Could you please provide me with your full name and email address so I can finalize the booking?
My name is John Smith and my email is kevinfar at gmail dot com.
Okay, so that's k e v i n f a r at g m a i l dot c o m. Is that correct?
Okay, one moment while I book you in.

tool_results.result_value: {"output":"Your appointment has been successfully scheduled for May 29, 2025, at 11:00 AM with John Smith. A confirmation email has been sent to kevinfar@gmail.com."}

transcript.message: Perfect, John. Your appointment for a Hammam at the Intercontinental Hotel is confirmed for tomorrow, May twenty ninth, at eleven am. A confirmation email has been sent to kevinfar at gmail dot com. We look forward to seeing you then. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Happy I could help with your booking! Have a wonderful day!

data.name: UK Proxy Google Search and Website Click Automation

parameters.pythonCode:
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

# Get session details from previous node
session_data = _input.first().json
connect_url = session_data['connectUrl']

async def run_automation():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        # Connect to Browserbase session
        browser = await p.chromium.connect_over_cdp(connect_url)
        context = browser.contexts[0]
        page = context.pages[0]
        
        # Navigate to Google UK
        await page.goto('https://www.google.co.uk')
        await page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
        
        # Perform search for "SEO Wirral"
        search_box = await page.wait_for_selector('textarea[name="q"]')
        await search_box.fill('SEO Wirral')
        await search_box.press('Enter')
        
        # Wait for search results
        await page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
        
        # Find and click the grahamseo.co.uk link
        link = await page.wait_for_selector('a[href*="grahamseo.co.uk"]', timeout=10000)
        await link.click()
        
        # Wait for navigation to complete
        await page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
        
        # Get final URL
        final_url = page.url
        
        await browser.close()
        
        return {
            'success': True,
            'finalUrl': final_url,
            'sessionId': session_data['id'],
            'message': 'Successfully clicked grahamseo.co.uk via Google UK search with UK proxy'
        }

# Run the async function
result = asyncio.run(run_automation())

return [{'json': result}]

parameters.instruction: Perform a UK google search for SEO Wirral, find https://grahamseo.co.uk/ and click the result.
